brand_angle: East Point's downtown soul-food kitchen — cafeteria-line comfort cooked fresh daily, the way grandma made it.
tagline: Cooked Fresh Daily, The Way Grandma Made It

rating.basis: Aggregated across public directories (TripAdvisor 3.8 of 5; cross-platform consensus ~3.8–4.0).
rating.note: Star figures reflect aggregated public listings. No individual reviews are reproduced. Individual experiences vary by visit and dish.

services.title: Daily Soul Food Plates
services.desc: Cafeteria-style hot plates with weekly rotating mains — turkey wings, oxtails, fried pork chops, neck bones, baked chicken — plus collards, cabbage, mac & cheese, and cornbread.

services.title: Lunch & Takeout
services.desc: Fast, fresh Mon-Fri lunch service near the East Point MARTA station, with takeout and delivery available through Uber Eats.

services.title: Catering & Family Trays
services.desc: Soul-food catering and family-size trays for gatherings, office lunches, and events around East Point and South Fulton.

self_exec_edge.title: Online Ordering
self_exec_edge.desc: Pre-order plates from the phone so the line moves and the kitchen knows what's coming.

self_exec_edge.title: Catering Intake
self_exec_edge.desc: A smart form captures headcount, date, and trays - quoted back automatically, no phone tag.

self_exec_edge.title: Pickup Reminders
self_exec_edge.desc: Friendly text confirmations and ready-for-pickup alerts mean hot food, fewer missed orders.

self_exec_edge.title: Repeat Regulars
self_exec_edge.desc: One tap to reorder a favorite plate or book the next office lunch before the last bite.

about_paragraph: Q's Restaurant is East Point's downtown soul-food kitchen - a cafeteria line where the steam table is loaded fresh every morning and the plates come out the way grandma made them. Just off the East Point MARTA station on White Way, it's where neighbors, commuters, and whole families pull up a tray for turkey wings, oxtails, fried pork chops, and all the sides that matter. No shortcuts, no frozen freight - just real Southern cooking, served generous and served daily.
hours_note: Lunch service Monday-Friday · call for current hours
